title: Zero Bedwars Pack
description: A clean, competitive BedWars texture pack built for speed, clarity, and PvP performance.
body:
This BedWars texture pack is designed specifically for fast-paced competitive gameplay. It focuses on clean visuals, high clarity, and performance optimization to help players react faster during intense PvP fights. Textures are simplified and polished to reduce visual distractions while keeping all important items instantly recognizable.

Blocks are optimized for fast bridging, weapons and tools are easy to read in combat, and UI elements are clean for quick inventory management. The pack keeps a vanilla-inspired style while enhancing contrast and smoothness, making it ideal for BedWars and other competitive PvP modes.

Features

Clean and competitive BedWars-focused textures

Optimized blocks for fast bridging and building

Clear weapons, tools, and items for PvP combat

Reduced visual clutter for better focus

Vanilla-style look with PvP improvements

Performance-friendly and lightweight

Ideal for BedWars, SkyWars, Duels, and PvP servers
